◎译　　名　守望 / The Companion / 守望者
◎片　　名　El acompañante
◎年　　代　2016
◎产　　地　古巴 / 西班牙

◎编　　剧　亚历杭德罗·布鲁格斯 Alejandro Brugués

◎简　　介  

　　Cuba, the mid-80s, anyone diagnosed with HIV/AIDS is sent to a military-run internment camp. Former boxing champion Horacio Romero is assigned to be a personal warden--companion--to troublemaker patient Daniel. Despite their initial distrust and ignorance, the two form a platonic bond that leads them to be better men. The Companion shows the stigma associated for those with HIV...
